top_signals.title: Sinking yen and robust economy support BOJ case for earlier rate hike
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi has indicated her preference for monetary easing, helping push the yen to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. shifts focus to Belgium after short-handed win over Bosnia and Herzegovina
top_signals.summary: The U.S. moved into the World Cup's round of 16 with a gritty 2-0 ⁠win over Bosnia and Herzegovina.

top_signals.title: Bear spray goes off in Japan post office, leaving five hospitalized
top_signals.summary: At least five people have been killed by bears in Japan since April 1 after a record 13 deaths last fiscal year.
